questions.question: Describe the main differences between the chalk and talk method and the PowerPoint presentation method in terms of learner engagement and teaching style. (10 marks)

A lecturer is using the chalk and talk method to deliver a lecture on game theory. The lecturer writes key terms on the blackboard and then elaborates on each term through verbal explanations. Which of the following is a potential drawback of this method? (5 marks)

Design a simple PowerPoint presentation on game theory that includes at least three key concepts (e.g. Nash equilibrium, Prisoner's dilemma, etc.) and label each slide with a brief description of the content. (15 marks)
